consultation.commitmentText: Every woman's journey is unique — and so is the path to healing. I'm committed to meeting you exactly where you are, with compassion, expertise, and a personalized plan that truly honors your body and your life.
consultation.formPrivacy: Your information is kept private and never shared.

steps.title: You Reach Out
steps.text: Fill out the short form or send me a direct message. Tell me a little about what you're experiencing and what you're hoping to change.

steps.title: 20-Min Discovery Call
steps.text: We have a relaxed, 20-minute call where we get to know each other, discuss your health goals, and I answer any questions you have about my approach.

steps.title: Your Custom Plan
steps.text: Together we choose the program or session type that suits you best, and you walk away with a clear first step toward feeling your best.

consultation.processSubtitle: A no-pressure conversation to explore what's holding you back and how I can help.
consultation.contactIntro: Whether you're curious about my services, have questions, or are ready to start — I'd love to hear from you. Fill out the form and I'll be back in touch within 24 hours.
consultation.metaDescription: Book your 20-minute discovery call with Anett and take the first step toward healing your gut, balancing your hormones, and reconnecting with your body.

about.parallaxText: Book your consultation and let's create a plan that truly works for you.
about.bioP1: My journey into women's health, hormones, and fertility began with my own struggles. I always dreamed of becoming a mother, but when I was told my fertility was beyond repair, I refused to accept that as my reality. Instead, I immersed myself in nutrition, biohacking, and Traditional Chinese Medicine (TCM) to heal my body from the inside out. Through a holistic yet science-backed approach, I restored my cycle, healed my gut, and regained my well-being.
about.quoteText: True wellness isn't about quick fixes — it's about understanding your body as a whole and giving it exactly what it needs to thrive.

pillars.label: Pillar I
pillars.title: Science Meets Holistic Healing
pillars.text: With a background in Nutritional Science from Stanford Medicine, I bridge the gap between modern science and ancient wisdom. My approach is rooted in both Western medical research and Eastern healing traditions, ensuring that every client gets a well-rounded, effective strategy for long-term health.

pillars.label: Pillar II
pillars.title: A Whole-Body Approach
pillars.text: I believe true healing happens when we address the body as a whole—physical, mental, emotional, and spiritual health are all connected. Whether you're struggling with hormonal imbalances, gut issues, or fertility concerns, I help uncover the root causes and create sustainable solutions tailored to you.

pillars.label: Pillar III
pillars.title: Transformative Results
pillars.text: By integrating Traditional Chinese Medicine, biohacking, and evidence-based nutrition, I help women heal their gut, regulate their cycle, and optimize their fertility. My goal is to empower you with the knowledge and tools to feel energized, confident, and hormonally aligned.

about.bioP2: This experience ignited my passion for bridging Eastern and Western medicine to help other women. I completed advanced training in Nutritional Science through a program at Stanford Medicine and continued exploring Ayurveda, herbal medicine, and functional approaches to health.
about.bioP3: Today, I help women overcome hormonal imbalances, gut issues, and fertility challenges with a root-cause approach that blends modern science with time-tested holistic healing.
about.workP1: Whether you're dealing with gut issues, hormonal imbalances, fertility challenges, or simply want to feel more vibrant and energized, I'm here to walk beside you.
about.workP2: I offer 1:1 sessions and structured programs tailored to your unique needs, as well as immersive wellness retreats and workshops where you can heal in community with other women.
about.workP3: Every plan I create is deeply personalized—because your story, your body, and your goals are completely your own.
about.metaDescription: Learn about Anett's journey from personal health struggles to becoming a holistic nutritionist and women's wellness expert.

events.parallaxText: Reach out directly or book a call to talk about which experience is right for you.
barcelonaFeatures: Daily Yoga & Pilates – Move with intention, awaken your body, and release stored tension.
Cacao Ceremony & Feminine Healing – Tap into your intuition and embrace the power of sisterhood.
Holistic Nutrition for Hormonal Balance – Enjoy nourishing, hormone-supporting meals crafted to fuel your vitality.
Wellness & Biohacking Workshops – Learn how to optimize your health with practical tools for longevity, energy, and balance.
Manifestation & Mindfulness Practices – Align with your desires and step into your most radiant self.
Spa & Sauna Time – Indulge in deep relaxation and let go of stress in a tranquil setting.
events.quoteText: This retreat is your invitation to slow down, reconnect with yourself, and embrace deep healing in a space of sisterhood and nature.
events.barcelonaP1: Escape the noise of daily life and immerse yourself in a 3-day transformational retreat designed to nourish your body, balance your hormones, and awaken your feminine energy.
events.barcelonaP2: Just 45 minutes from Barcelona, in a breathtaking luxury villa surrounded by the serene nature of Catalonia, this retreat is your invitation to slow down, reconnect with yourself, and embrace deep healing.
events.metaDescription: Immersive wellness retreats and workshops with Anett — from luxury retreats in Barcelona to healthy baking workshops in Tallinn.
events.tallinnComingSoon: Limited spots available — details coming soon!

Gut-friendly swaps for traditional baking staples
Hands-on baking and tasting in a cozy setting
events.introText: Step away from the noise of daily life and immerse yourself in transformational experiences designed to nourish your body, calm your mind, and reconnect you to your feminine essence.
events.tallinnP1: Join Anett for a hands-on baking experience where delicious meets nutritious. Learn to create gut-friendly, hormone-supporting treats that taste as good as they make you feel.
events.tallinnP2: Perfect for wellness lovers and foodies who want to bake without the bloat.

home.welcomeP4: Your health is your power. Ready to glow from the inside out?

home.storyP1: I know firsthand how frustrating it can be to deal with hormonal imbalances, gut issues, or fertility struggles—and I also know that true healing is possible. My approach blends nutrition, biohacking, and Eastern medicine to help you feel amazing, inside and out.
